/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/elaborato_Alessio_Masala.dir/main.cpp.o -o elaborato_Alessio_Masala  lib/libgtest.a lib/libgmock.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
